subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first ruler of Mewar?

question_hi.subject: Rajasthan History
question_hi.question_en: What is the origin of the Marwar region?
question_hi.A_en: The Marwar region originated from the merger of various princely states.
question_hi.B_en: Marwar was established by Raja Rai Singh.
question_hi.B_hi: राजा राय सिंह ने मर्वार की संरचना करने के लिए
question_hi.C_en: Marwar was established by Maharaja Mansingh I.
question_hi.C_hi: महाराजा माहाराज आई ने मर्वार की संरचना करने के लिए
question_hi.D_en: Marwar was established by Jai Singh II.
question_hi.D_hi: जाय सिंग आई ने मर्वार की संरचना करने के लिए
question_hi.question_en: Who established Marwar? (Write the name of the ruler)
question_hi.question_hi: मर्वार को किस्मान करने के लिए (राजगण का नाम लिया गया)
